title: cotula sternutatoria
intro: Cotula sternutatoria, also known as sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to relieve respiratory issues and sinus congestion. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to stimulate mucus production, helping to clear nasal passages and alleviate symptoms of colds and allergies. Cotula sternutatoria can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with some herbalists recommending it as a natural remedy for respiratory health and allergies.
